calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enter judgment pursuant to CCP 664.6" is granted.
For the 9:30 a.m. Law & Motion calendar, all attorneys and parties may appear in Department 302 remotely. Remote hearings will be conducted by videoconference using Zoom. To appear remotely at the hearing, go to the court's website at sfsuperiorcourt.org under "Online Services," navigate to "Tentative Rulings," and click on the appropriate link, or dial the corresponding phone number.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-13-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Set For Trial On Oct-25-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
